property.name: Text
property.value: If successful, you punch defender for 5 life cards. Remove this card from game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Raise your anger by 2 and reduce every villain's anger by 1. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Steal a Dragon Ball of your choice. Remove this card from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Your successful energy beam attack slashes defender for 6 life cards. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: You reduce every hero's anger level to zero. Remove this card from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Intimidation removes foe's ally of your choice from game. Remove this card from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Select any Dragon Ball in your deck and put it into play. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Raise any one of your personalities to its highest power stage. Draw a card.

property.name: Text
property.value: Set all of your opponents' personalities to 2 power stages above 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: Draw 3 cards. Place the top card from your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Raise your anger 2 levels. The first combat your opponent declares while you control Earth Dragon Ball 4 is skipped. (They do not rejuvenate).

property.name: Text
property.value: Raise any one of your personalities to his highest power stage. Raise your anger 2 levels. Draw 2 cards. Place the top 2 cards of your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels. Once while you control Earth Dragon Ball 6, during your Attack Phase, you may end combat and raise your main personality to its highest power stage. (This power remains active until used.)

property.name: Text
property.value: During your Attackers Attack phase, you may play this card from your hand to end combat. Choose 3 cards in your discard pile and place them on top of your life deck. Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. Your opponent skips his next Attacker Attacks phase. During your next Attacker Attacks phase, perform another physical attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. You can use this power twice per Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: During your turn, if you skip the Combat Step during your Rejuvination Step lower your opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Whenever your opponent stops one of your physical attacks, lower his Main Personality 2 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your Life Deck or discard pile for "The Car" and place it into play.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing +3 life cards of damage if "The Car" is in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: Choose an Ally in play. For the remainder of combat your opponent cannot redirect damage to that Ally and the Ally cannot take over Combat. If you have "The Car" in play, you can choose up to 2 Allies instead of 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. If "The Car" is in play, you may use this power twice per Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, you may use this power twice per Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Whenever your opponent uses a power or effect that lets him draw one or more cards, draw one card.

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your discard pile for a Vegeta named card and shuffle it back into your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Whenever any player has 4 or more cards in his hand, or 5 or more if he declared a Saiyan Tokui-Waza, he may not draw anymore cards into his hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per Combat, a player may shuffle the top 2 Combat cards in his discard pile back into his Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Reveal the top card of your Life Deck. If it can perform a physical attack, you may immediately perform it directly from your Life Deck. The physical attack does +3 power stages of damage. Otherwise, discard the card.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 6 life cards of damage. If "The Car" is in play, this attack does +3 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Costs 1 power stage to perform. If "The Car" is in play, you may perform this attack twice per Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: For each life card of damage Android 19 deals with a successful energy attack, Android 19 gains 1 power stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Your opponent discards the top X cards of his Life Deck. X = the number of personalities in play with "Android" in the title.

property.name: Text
property.value: For the remainder of the game at the beginning of each Step, the top card of every Life Deck must be turned faceup if it is facedown. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: If your opponent's Main Personality has "Android" in the title, remove the top 2 cards of your opponent's Life Deck from the game and then discard the next top 3 cards of his Life Deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +1 life cards of damage. If successful, your opponent discards 2 cards from his Life Deck for each card in his hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance X. X = The number of Dragon Balls you control. Reveal any number of cards in your hand to your opponent. Your opponent reveals the same number of cards in his hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. Gain 3 power stages. If successful, you may discard up to 2 cards from your hand and then immediately draw the same number of cards.

property.name: Text
property.value: Tuff Enuff only. This effect costs 6 power stages. Play this card immediately after a physical attack that you perform wins the game. To score an Overkill you only need to deal 5 Life Cards of damage below 0 instead of 7.

property.name: Text
property.value: If your Main Personality's power rating is higher than your opponent's Main Personality, you may discard up to 2 of your opponent's Allies and up to 2 of your opponent's Non-Combat cards in play. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If performed against a villain, this attack stays on the table to be used 1 more time this Combat. Raise your anger 1 level. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. If performed by a personality without "Puppet" in the title whose current power rating is below 300,000, this attack cannot be stopped. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If successful, shuffle all Vegeta Named cards in your discard pile into your Life Deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. Raise your anger 1 level. If successful, search your Life Deck for any card with "Sword" in the title that is not "Trunks' Sword Slice" and place it into your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. If successful, your opponent discards a card from his hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: The first styled attack you perform during Combat gains, "If successful, your opponent discards a card from his hand." If your opponent did not declare a Tokui-Waza or declared a Freestyle Tokui-Waza, all attacks you perform gain this effect.

property.name: Text
property.value: This personality gains 3 power stages. This card can affect Dragon Balls. Choose 1 card at random from your opponent's hand and remove it from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: (This card does not affect the Ally rules of overlaying.) When you use a card effect to search your Life Deck for an Ally that is placed immediately into play, that Ally may have a higher personality level than your Main Personality.

property.name: Text
property.value: Attach to one of your opponent's personalities. While attached, this personality's PUR is -1, to a minimum of 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. If used by Frieza, for the remainder of Combat all your attacks from Frieza Named cards do an additional +3 life cards of damage. If successful, shuffle all Frieza Named cards in your discard pile into your Life Deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: For the remainder of Combat, your attacks do +2 power stages of damage for each personality in play. If your Main Personality is Saibaimen, then for the remainder of Combat, all of your energy attacks from Saiyan Saga, Frieza Saga, and Trunks Saga are focused attacks. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +6 power stages of damage. Costs 6 power stages to perform. If successful, discard up to 6 Non-Combat cards in play. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: If your Main Personality is a fused personality, shuffle 7 cards in your discard pile into your Life Deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: All your attacks do +2 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. Lower your opponent's anger 3 levels. If successful, all Goku Named cards in your Life Deck without Endurance gain Endurance 2 for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: The first energy attack you perform in Combat costs 1 less power stage to perform. If you declared a Blue Tokui-Waza, your first energy attack costs 0 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Prevent all the life cards damage from the first energy attack performed against your during Combat. If you declared a Blue Tokui-Waza, your opponent cannot gain anger from cards that perform energy attacks.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All of your physical attacks do +4 power stages of damage. If you declared a Blue Tokui-Waza, all of your energy attacks do +3 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: At the beginning of your Rejuvenation Step, if the top card of your discard pile is a Saiyan Style card, raise your anger 2 levels. If Goku is in play, raise your anger 3 levels instead, and shuffle the bottom 2 Saiyan Style cards of your discard pile into your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. Raise your anger 1 level. For the remainder of Combat, all your Saiyan Style attacks do +1 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All your Saiyan Style attacks that do not remove themselves from the game after use are placed at the bottom of your Life Deck after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. If successful, attach to your opponent's Main Personality. While this card is attached, the owner of Half-Nelson may discard a card from his hand during his "Attacker Attacks" phase to make the attached personality discard the top 2 cards of his Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: When one of your Celestial Fighters stops an attack with a card that removes itself from the game after use, you may place that card at the bottom of your Life Deck instead of removing it from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: During your "Attacker Attacks" phase, you may discard a Non-Combat card from your hand to have your Main Personality perform an energy attack that costs 1 power stage to perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 2. Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. For the remainder of Combat, all your cards with Endurance have their Endurance increased by +2. Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: While this Drill is in play, your Main Personality's PUR is increased by +3.

property.name: Text
property.value: At the beginning of your Rejuvenation Step, you may place the bottom card of your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, gain 2 anger. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. Look at your opponent's hand, choose 1 card and have him shuffle that card back into his Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Set your opponent's anger to 0. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, lower your opponent's Main Personality 1 level. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, this card stays on the table to be used 1 more time this Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, raise your Main Personality to his highest power stage, then shuffle the top 4 cards of your discard pile into your Life Deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 5 power stages of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, it does 10 power stages instead. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage, or stops a physical attack. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, discard a random card from your opponent's hand. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Raise all your personalities to their highest power stage. Search your Life Deck or discard pile for an Ally and place it in play at 3 power stages above 0. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Play this as your first attack in Combat. Physical attack doing 3 power stages of damage. This attack does +1 power stage of damage for every power stage the attacker is above 0. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat as the defender you may chose to draw 1 card for every Dragon Ball that you control, instead of drawing 3 cards.

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused energy attack doing +1 life cards of damage for each card in your discard pile with "Kamehameha" in the title. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your Life Deck for a level 1 Ally and place it into play facedown. You may ignore the Ally uniqueness rule for this Ally. When you redirect damage from an attack to this Ally, or when you have this Ally take control of Combat, you turn this Ally faceup and set him at his highest power stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per game during your Non-Combat Step, shuffle up to 5 styled cards in your discard pile into your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Majin only. Use when you perform an energy attack and you have performed an energy attack during your previous "Attacker Attacks" phase, the energy attack is shuffled into your Life Deck after use, even if it would normally remove itself from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: End Combat. All players discard all cards in their hands. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. For the remainder of combat, your opponent cannot use any cards that let him look at cards in your hand or your Life Deck. If used by Majin Buu, this attack is focused and raises your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage or stops a focused energy attack. When you use this card, it is the style of your choice. While it is in your discard pile, it is the style of your choice. This card cannot be more than 1 style at once.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat, both players discard the top card of their Life Decks. If both cards discarded this way are not the same card type, your opponent discards the next top card of his Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 7 power stages of damage. If this attack deals damage to an Ally, that Ally is discarded. If your Main Personality is at 5 power stages above 0 or higher, shuffle this card back into your deck after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage or energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Namekian Heritage only. Energy attack. If you declared Tokui-Waza, you may search your Life Deck for an Energy Combat Card and place it in your hand. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +1 life cards of damage. For the remainder of Combat, after a player receives damage from a successful attack, he shuffled his hand into his Life Deck and then draws the same number of cards he shuffled into his Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Name a non-Dragon Ball card. Look through the top 5 cards of your Life Deck for it. If it is there, show it to your opponent and set the 5 cards aside in the order they were in to shuffle any 5 cards in your discard pile into your Life Deck. Now place the 5 cards on top of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Your Main Personality gains 5 power stages. For the remainder of Combat, whenever your Main Personality performs a styled physical attack, you may pay 3 power stages to make it a focused attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Piccolo Only. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, then any physical attacks Piccolo performs that cannot stay on the table to be used again this combat gain "This card stays on the table to be used 1 more time this combat. Remove from game after use." Remove from game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: If you declared a Tokui-Waza, for the remainder of combat any "If successful" effects on Physical Combat and Energy Combat cards are "if stopped" effects instead. If your anger has already been raise a total of 2 or more levels this Combat, draw a card.

property.name: Text
property.value: For the remainder of Combat, whenever your opponent stops one of your attacks, he discards the top 2 cards of his Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused energy attack doing +2 power stages of damage. For the remainder of Combat, all of your energy attacks do +2 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. For the remainder of Combat, any cards in your Life Deck that do not have Endurance have Endurance 2. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. If your opponent has a Physical Combat, Energy Combat, or Combat card in play that can be used an additional time(s) this Combat, discard the top 10 cards of your opponent's Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: (You may place an Ally into play with this effect even if your opponent has the same level of that personality in play as an Ally.) Search your Life Deck for an Ally and place it in play at 5 power stages above 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: Shuffle up to 4 cards in your discard pile into your Life Deck. Remove up to 4 cards in your opponent's discard pile from the game. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: You may immediately place a Non-Combat card from your hand into play.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. If performed by Frieza and you have 2 or more anger, this is a focused attack. This card counts as 1 copy of "Frieza's Irritation Grows" while in your discard pile.

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. If successful, this personality does not have to pay any costs for energy attacks for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Chi-Chi only. Discard all of your opponent's Non-Combat cards in play. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. If successful, for the remainder of Combat, your opponent must discard 1 card from his hand before each physical attack he performs. Your Main Personality gains 4 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. If performed by your Main Personality and he currently has a lower power rating than your opponent's Main Personality, this card stays on the table to be used one more time this Combat. Place the bottom card of your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use when your opponent is about to discard any of your Allies. Choose one of your Allies that is about to be discarded. The chosen Ally is not discarded.

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your deck or discard pile for a Combat, or Physical Combat, or Energy Combat card. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. If you stopped an attack during your last "Defender Defends" phase, raise your anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 3. If you played 3 attacks from 3 different cards from your hand in 3 consecutive "Attacker Attacks" phases this Combat, discard the top 9 cards of your opponent's Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. Costs 1 power stage to perform. If successful, and you declared a Black Tokui-Waza, your opponent must discard a card from his hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. Doing +2 power stages of damage. If you declared a Black Tokui-Waza, you may use this power to stop an energy attack instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: The first energy attack you perform in Combat costs 2 less power stage to perform. If you declared a Black Tokui-Waza, all of your energy attacks do +2 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. Raise your anger 1 level. This attack cannot be stopped by Physical Combat cards. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. Empower 2. Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels. If used by Trunks or Kid Trunks, place a Trunks or Kid Trunks Named card in your discard pile into your hand. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 Life Cards of damage. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stop an energy attack. Raise your anger 1 level. Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per combat, in place of an attack, discard a card from your hand and draw the top two cards from your Life Deck. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use only if you have used a Non-Combat card this turn that is not a Drill. Your Main Personality gains 4 power stages. Raise your anger 1 level. Draw a card.

property.name: Text
property.value: Before the first turn begins, you may search your Life Deck for this Drill and place it into play. When entering Combat, lower your opponent's anger 2 levels and your Main Personality gains 2 power stages. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 1,000,000. Your opponent looks at the top 5 cards of your Life Deck and chooses 2 of them. Place those 2 cards in your hand and discard the other 3.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use when entering Combat and your Main Personality is at level 1. You cannot win by the Most Powerful Personality Victory for the remainder of the game. Advance your Main Personality to level 2. Shuffle the bottom 5 cards of your discard pile into your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: (If you declared a Tokui-Waza, this card is a Styled card matching your Tokui-Waza's Style.) Focused physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. Choose for the following effect to last either for the remainder of Combat or until your opponent deals at least 1 life card of damage to you. All life cards of damage from your attacks are removed from the game instead of discarded.

property.name: Text
property.value: (This card is not legal for play) Sensei Deck. Your opponent cannot use "Trunks Energy Sphere" for the remainder of the game. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, choose one of the following card types: Non-Combat, Ally, Battleground, Location, or Sensei. For the remainder of the game, your opponent cannot use that card type. Limit 2 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. For the remainder of Combat, damage from your attacks cannot be prevented. If successful, remove 6 cards in your opponent's discard pile from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck Only. Discard a Non-Combat card or Ally in play. Search your opponent's Life Deck for up to 2 cards and remove them from the game. Your opponent searches your Life Deck for up to 2 cards and removes them from the game. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Use when your opponent uses a Non-Combat/Non-Drill card.) Stops the effects of the Non-Combat/Non-Drill card your opponent is using.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Stop an energy attack. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Power: For the remainder of combat whenever you stop an attack with a card from the Frieza Saga, you may shuffle it back into your Life Deck after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: (At the beginning of the game you may place this card from your Sensei Deck into play.) Sensei Deck. Use during your opponent's Declare Step. Discard a card from your hand to force your opponent to declare Combat for this turn. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: You may have drills of different fighting styles in play at the same time.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat as the attacker you may draw a card.

property.name: Text
property.value: For the remainder of the game you may put the top card of your discard pile into your Life Deck during the Rejuvenation Step even if you didn't skip Combat. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If your opponent's Main Personality has a higher power rating than your Main Personality, then this attack deals +6 power stages of damage instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: All of your physical attacks do +1 power stages of damage. Attacks that cannot be stopped can be stopped while this Drill is in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: Your PUR is +1 until the end of the game. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Until the end of Combat, if a card power lets you search your Life Deck for any number of Allies, you get to search for 1 additional Ally. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Your Allies in play cannot be discarded. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Show your opponent your hand. Draw a card for each Non-Combat card in your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: The next attack you perform this Combat cost 2 less power stages to perform. If the attack is stopped, your opponent discards 3 life cards.

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Reshuffle this card into your Life Deck. If this card gets discarded from an attack after it's been reshuffled, your opponent discards 5 life cards. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: All of your attacks do +X power stages of damage. X = your anger level. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If stopped, and you declared a Tokui-Waza, shuffle this card into your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. End Combat. Bulma and Chi-Chi must be in play to play this card. Unless your Main Personality is Bulma, limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. Choose X cards in your discard pile and shuffle them into your Life Deck. X equals either 5, or the number of Allies that you have in play whichever number is lower. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, show the top card of your Life Deck to all players. If it'a a physical attack draw the card into your hand, otherwise discard the card.

property.name: Text
property.value: You cannot use this card if you control less than 3 Dragon Balls of the same set. Shuffle all Dragon Balls you control back into each owners' Life Decks. Shuffle 10 cards from your discard pile back into your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. If successful, your opponent cannot use Main Personality powers for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Whenever you use a Non-Combat/Non-Drill that is not Limit 1 per deck or restricted, you may discard this card instead of that Non-Combat/Non-Drill card. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use when entering Combat. Reveal the top 7 cards of your Life Deck. Place in play any Non-Combat cards revealed and shuffle the rest back into your Life Deck. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use this card during the Non-Combat Step. Search your Life Deck for up to 3 Drills and place them into your hand. You must skip the Combat Step for your next 2 turns. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. Your next attack deals +4 life cards of damage in this Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If successful, your opponent pays +2 power stages for his next attack in this Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If successful, prevent 3 power stages of damage from attacks performed against you for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Tien only. Power Tien to his highest power stage. The next energy attack Tien performs this Combat gets to be performed 1 more time including any secondary effects. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. If your opponent is a villain, any power stages of damage dealt from this attack counts as Life Cards instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If successful, choose any Ally in play. You now control that Ally as if it were your own.

property.name: Text
property.value: You may discard a card from your hand in place of an attack to give this Drill to your opponent. All attacks performed against you do +2 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use this card after you take Life Cards of damage. Shuffle the discarded cards back into your Life Deck, and discard the same amount of cards.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. Power your Main Personality to his highest power stage. Shuffle the bottom 3 cards from your discard pile back into your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, your opponent discards the top card of his Life Deck at the beginning of every turn until his Main Personality deals life cards of damage with a physical attack. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your Life Deck for a Location and place it into play. Draw a card. Unless your Main Personality is Gohan, limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Vegeta only. Use this card immediately when Trunks is in play as an Ally and then is discarded or removed from the game. Gain 2 anger.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If successful and performed by Gohan, the next attack you perform this Combat is considered a focused attack and its damage cannot be prevented.

property.name: Text
property.value: You may only use this card if your opponent has dealt you 6 or more life cards of damage from a single attack this Combat. Combat ends.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If successful, your opponent discards a card from his hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: For the remainder of Combat Allies can not take control of Combat and all attacks performed by a Main Personality do +2 power stages of damage. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. If you declared a Black Tokui-Waza, gain 1 anger.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If you have 3 or more anger, this attack costs 0 power stages to perform. If you declared a Black Tokui-Waza, you may stop a physical attack instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If successful, you may look at the top 3 cards of your Life Deck, place one of them in your hand, and the other 2 back on top of your Life Deck. If you declared a Black Tokui-Waza, you may look at 5 cards instead of 3.

property.name: Text
property.value: Power: If you control at least 3 Dragon Balls of the same set, advance a personality level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. For each life card of damage this attack deals, gain 1 power stage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, you may choose 1 card in your discard pile and shuffle it back into your Life Deck instead of gaining any power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Whenever a card tells you to put cards back into your Life Deck, you may put twice as many cards back into your Life Deck instead. If you declared a Namekian Tokui-Waza, all of your attacks do +2 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Power: When entering Combat, look at the top 6 cards of your Life Deck and place them back in any order, and if you declared a Red Tokui-Waza, raise your anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Any named cards that perform attacks do +2 power stages of damage. If you declared a Red Tokui-Waza, they do +3 power stages of damage instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All of your Allies power up one extra stage during your Power Up Step. If you declared a Red Tokui-Waza, they power up 2 extra stages instead, and any attacks they perform do +1 life card of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Defense Shield: Stops the first unstopped physical attack performed against you in Combat. If you declared a Saiyan Tokui-Waza, you may have up to 2 copies of any Saiyan Style Drill in play at once.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All your physical attacks do +2 power stages of damage. Each turn if the first card you draw using your Mastery is a Saiyan Style card, you may show it to your opponent to draw another card.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All of your attacks do +2 power stages of damage. If you declared a Saiyan Tokui-Waza, draw a card when entering Combat, and any damage from your successful attacks cannot be prevented.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Prevent 2 power stages of damage from any physical or energy attack performed against you. If you declared an Orange Tokui-Waza, all of your energy attacks do +1 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Whenever your opponent reveals a Dragon Ball while taking life cards of damage, you may take that Dragon Ball and place it in play and use its power instead of it going to the bottom of your opponent's Life Deck. The Dragon Ball cannot currently be in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All of your physical attacks do +4 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Tuff Enuff Only. Constant Combat Power: When an attack you perform with a Tuff Enuff only card becomes successful, name a Non-Dragon Ball card. Your opponent searches his Life Deck for 1 copy of that card and discards it.

property.name: Text
property.value: Tuff Enuff Only. Constant Combat Power: Speediness - Whenever an attack you perform with a Tuff Enuff only card becomes successful, choose 3 Tuff Enuff only cards in your discard pile and shuffle them into your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Tuff Enuff Only. Constant Combat Power: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. Shuffle up to 3 Tuff Enuff only cards in your discard pile into your Life Deck. Draw a card.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If the top card of your discard pile is a Red Style card, this is a focused attack, raise your anger 1 level, and Mighty Mask gains 4 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All of your physical attack do +2 power stages of damage. When the top card of your discard pile is a Red Style card, all of your attacks do an additional +2 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: The first Red Style physical attack you perform each Combat is a focused attack. Once per Combat, whenever you stop an attack from your hand with a Red Style card, you may shuffle that Red Style card back into your Life Deck after use, even if it would remove itself from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Your opponent plays with his hand faceup on the table. Once per Combat during your "Attacker Attacks" phase, if your have an Ally in play, you may discard a card in your hand to draw a card and raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Your opponent players with his hand faceup on the table. When any 1 of your Allies leaves play, you may shuffle him into your Life Deck. Afterward, raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Your opponent plays with his hand faceup on the table. During your first "Attacker Attacks" phase each Combat, you may have 1 of your Allies take over Combat for Bardock. No other Ally may take over Combat unless Bardock is at 0 or 1 power stage above 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When a Drill or Combat card increases the power stages or life cards of damage for any of your attacks, raise that increase by 1. If the top card of your discard pile is a Blue Style card, your Drills cannot leave play because of your opponent's card effects.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When a Drill that you have in play increase the power stages or life cards of damage from any of your attacks, raise that increase by 2. When you perform a physical attack and the top card of your discard pile is a Blue Style card, gain 3 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When a Drill that you have in play increase the power stages or life cards of damage from any of your attacks, raise that increase by 3. When performing a physical attack with a Blue Style card and the top card of your discard pile is a Blue Style card, it's a focused attack doing +3 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When your opponent uses a Combat card that does not stop an attack, you may remove an Android 17 Named card in your discard pile from the game and discard the top card of your Life Deck to stop all of the effects of that Combat card.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When you perform an attack with a Frieza Named card, it is a focused attack doing +2 power stages of damage. During the Rejuvenation Step, if you place a Frieza Named card into your Life Deck, shuffle the bottom card of your discard pile into your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All of your Krillin Named cards that are removed from the game after use are discarded instead. All Krillin named cards in your Life Deck that do not have Endurance gain Endurance 2.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If you declared a Black Tokui-Waza, your opponent discards a card at random from his hand. This power may be used twice per Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Attach this card to your Cell Saga Namekian Style Mastery. When you use your Mastery while this card is attached, you may shuffle the bottom card of your discard pile into your Life Deck. You may have only 1 copy of Namekian Healing attached.

property.name: Text
property.value: Attach this card to your Cell Saga Saiyan Style Mastery. If you draw 2 cards with your Mastery while this card is attached, you may shuffle the top card of your discard pile back into your Life Deck and raise your Main Personality to its highest power stage. You may have only 1 copy of Saiyan Conservation attached.

property.name: Text
property.value: Tuff Enuff only. Whenever you gain anger this Combat, all of your attacks do +1 life cards of damage for each anger level gained to a maximum of 5 for the remainder of Combat. The next attack you perform this Combat gains "Draw a card." Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Your Main Personality gains 6 power stages. Draw the bottom card of your discard pile. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Reveal the top 5 cards of your Life Deck to all players. Choose from them 1 Physical Combat card that can perform a physical attack and place it in your hand. Put the other cards on top of your Life Deck in any order.

property.name: Text
property.value: You may use this card when you discard a card for your Cell Saga Black Style Mastery. Your opponent chooses a card in his hand to be discarded before the Mastery discards one of his cards. Remove the top 2 cards of your opponent's Life Deck from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 4. Energy attack doing 3 life cards of damage and an additional +X life cards of damage. X = Your current anger level. If successful, shuffle this card into your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. Damage from this attack cannot be prevented. This card is considered a Named card for your Main Personality for deck construction and gameplay.

property.name: Text
property.value: If you are the 2nd player to pass when both players pass consecutively, you may remove this card from the game. If you do and your opponent's turn is next, skip that turn and you cannot play Non-Combat cards during your next turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: Attach to one of your Allies in play. While attached, this Ally can use his power a 2nd time each Combat. This does not work with Constant Combat Powers or powers that can be used multiple times in a Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Tuff Enuff only. Physical attack doing 1 power stage of damage and an additional +1 power stages of damage for each Tuff Enuff only card in your discard pile. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Attach to your Main Personality. While attacked, Stunned cannot be played or used, and you do not lose power stages from your opponent's card effects. This does not affect power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical or energy attack. Stops all of your opponent's physical and energy attacks for the remainder of Combat. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Cards that end Combat including Dragon Balls may not be played or used while this Drill is in play. This Drill affects all players.
